untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) multi-day over-extended trend state, (2) minor opening gap magnitude identification, (3) price building on gap, (4) giant candle identification, (5) counting and taking out multiple small candles on left side. These require pattern recognition logic, relative candle size comparisons, and gap classification that cannot be expressed with the allowed indicators and operators. Gap_size, candle_size_definition, and number_of_small_candles_taken_out are all marked AUTHOR_SILENT with no quantitative thresholds provided.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation uses body size (via ATR comparison) as proxy for giant candle and gap direction as entry signal, but this loses the core pattern logic of trend reversal with specific gap and candle sequence. Manual review and additional parameters required for proper implementation.
